description_long: This is a bald adult male figure dressed in a formal business suit, complete with a collared shirt, necktie, and dress shoes. The suit jacket is buttoned and tailored, fitting snugly around a slightly rounded torso, and the pants are straight-cut, matching the jacket in texture and style. The hands are open and relaxed at the sides, with fingers slightly splayed, and the facial features are neutral and clean-shaven. The shoes are classic and formal, complementing the overall business attire. The figure's posture is upright and symmetrical, with arms slightly extended away from the body. The overall appearance suggests a professional individual, likely encountered in urban or business environments.
description: A bald adult male in a formal business suit with a tie and dress shoes, standing upright with arms slightly out. The figure has a rounded torso and a neutral, clean-shaven face.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full suit, tie, open hands, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the rounded torso, profile of the face, and the straight cut of the suit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the suit jacket, pants, and the back of the head.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile and suit fit.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared shirt and necktie
